text: Is there anything that we could do that we're not doing to uh remedy this situation so that the instrument does not experience this pain or as much of it. There is a little that can be done due to a complex of preexisting distortions. The distortions are a triple and a the a source. There is the how we say less than adequat, a work of your chairons, which allows a four various distortions in the left wrist area. There is the distortion, a cold cystamic, a lupus, erythematosis, which causes the musculature of the lower left and a right arms a two allow for distortions in the normal, shall we say configuration of bone. Lastly, there is the nerve, a damage, more especially to the left, but in above appendages from the thoracic outlet in the course of the awakening a behavior, the instrument again respond to the various signals which ring the toxin of a pain, thus alerting the mind complex, which in a turn moves the aphysical complex in a many and a sattala configurations which relieve the various distortions. Your friend agrees these distortions as has been stated before immediately a prior to the beginning of the working. However, during the working the instrument is not with its a yellow hooray, a chemical, a vehicle, and lastly the many small movements which could most effectively aid in the decrease of these distortions is not possible. Ra must carefully examine the a mental configurations of the mind a complex in order to make even the grossest manipulation, it is not our skill to use a yellow ray vehicle. That is the framing of that which lift head a the coverlet from a the body a slightly in order a two a compensate for loss of warmth, the a wearing of a material, a warming the a manual appendages would then be indicated.
